title: MySQL Workbench Import Too Slow? Do This Instead
description: Workbench can hang on large dumps. Here’s a more reliable import flow.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Workbench is fine for small dumps, but large files often hang or fail.
Split the dump and use CLI import for reliability.
See also: **Import Large SQL Files with MySQL CLI**.

content.title: Fix Workbench imports
content.text: Split big dumps and switch to CLI.

faq.question: Why does Workbench hang?
faq.answer: It struggles with very large files and long-running imports.
